productDisplayName: Nike Men's Basic Woven Med Blue Short
description: CompositionNavy Blue shorts with built-in briefs, made of 100% nylon with a 100% polyester lining, has blue and orange stripes along the length of the legs, deep welt pockets and one back pocket, comfortable elastic waistband with drawstring and emboidered logo in bright orange on the leftFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Remove immediately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron   Do not dry clean Comfort and style go hand in hand in this pair of black shorts from nike. The blue and orange stripes running down both sides add that touch of vibrancy. The broad elastic waistband coupled with the drawstrings offers a snug, customised, comfort Fit. The spacious welt pockets make it all the more a must-have in your wardrobe. Wear them for gymming, jogging or to play a sport. A smart tee and a pair of well-fitting shoes are all you need to complete that sporting look.
